name: Antarctica
stopoverNote: Depart from Ushuaia, Argentina (world's southernmost city). Plan Argentina trip first, then continue south. Expedition cruise season: Nov–Mar only.

cities.name: Antarctic Peninsula
cities.notes: Best access point — Zodiac landings with penguins and leopard seals

cities.name: South Georgia
cities.notes: King penguin colonies by the millions and Shackleton's grave at Grytviken

cities.name: McMurdo Station
cities.notes: Main research hub with Dry Valleys and Scott's Discovery Hut nearby
